name: typesql
description: Compile-time SQL parsing and schema typing for TypeScript.

scripts.typecheck: time tsgo --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && time npm run --silent monadcheck-log
scripts.typecheck:watch: nodemon -w core -w src -w test -w tsconfig.json -w package.json -e ts,tsx,json -x "sh -c 'clear && MI=1 npm run typecheck'"
scripts.test: npm run --silent typecheck && npm run --silent typecheck -w @typesql/example-postgres && npm run --silent typecheck -w @typesql/example-nest-postgres && npm run --silent test -w @typesql/nest && node --test "test/**/*.test.ts" && npm run --silent test -w @typesql/example-postgres && npm run --silent test -w @typesql/example-nest-postgres && npm run --silent format:check
scripts.monadcheck-log: mkdir -p .logs && LOGFILE=".logs/$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S%N 2>/dev/null || date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S).monad.log" && export LOGFILE && npm run --silent monadcheck 2> >(node --input-type=module -e "import{appendFile}from'node:fs/promises';for await(const c of process.stdin){process.stdout.write(c);process.env.MI||await appendFile(process.env.LOGFILE,c)}")>&2; MC=$?; if [ -f "$LOGFILE" ]; then 7z a "${LOGFILE%.monad.log}.data.7z" ./core ./src -mx=9; fi; exit $MC
